task:
Build this app in Clear:

**AI Ticket Categorizer** (Level 9)

Build an AI agent that categorizes support tickets. Define a Categorizer agent that returns { category, priority, suggested_action }. Tickets table stores the result. POST /api/tickets receives { subject, description } and returns the categorized ticket.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Tickets table:
  subject, required
  description
  category
  priority

# Define a Categorizer agent
# POST /api/t
final_source:
build for javascript backend
database is local memory

create a Tickets table:
  subject, required
  description
  category
  priority
  suggested_action

agent 'Categorizer' receives text:
  result = ask claude 'Categorize this ticket into category (Bug/Feature Request/Account Issue), priority (High/Medium/Low), and suggested action. Return JSON.' with text returning JSON text:
    category
    priority
    suggested_action
  send back result

when user sends ticket to /api/tickets:
  combined_text is (ticket's subject + ' ' + ticket's description)
  categorized is call 'Categorizer' with combined_text
  set ticket's category to categorized's category
  set ticket's priority to categorized's priority
  set ticket's suggested_action to categorized's suggested_action
  saved = save ticket to Tickets
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/tickets:
  send back all Tickets
